name: python3-ubireader
title: python3-ubireader
summary: scripts capable of extracting the contents of UBI and UBIFS images (Python 3)
description:
scripts capable of extracting the contents of UBI and UBIFS images (Python 3)
This package contains a ollection of scripts capable of extracting the
contents of UBI and UBIFS images, along with analyzing these images to
determine the parameter settings to recreate them using the mtd-utils tools.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ubireader_display_blocks because scripts capable of extracting the contents of UBI and UBIFS images (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ubireader_display_blocks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ubireader_display_blocks [options] [args]` as documented upstream for ubireader_display_blocks.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ubireader_display_blocks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ubireader_display_blocks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
